sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Light gun calibration system used but sub-pixel rendering data not available.

special_mechanics.name: Light Gun Aiming
special_mechanics.description: Super Scope 6 is a light gun shooter. Player aims and fires at screen targets using the Super Scope peripheral. Calibration required to establish screen center reference point.

physics_values.note: Accuracy dependent on controller position stability

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Super Scope 6 is a light gun game collection, not a platformer. Contains no character movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics. Game mechanics focus on aiming, shooting accuracy, and calibration rather than player locomotion. Source documentation provides only game mode descriptions and rules, no physics parameters.
